details.heading: Your transaction is secure
details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: 2 Available Sizes of Pet Carrier: For optimal fit, our M carrier measures 17.5 x 11 x 11 inches, designed for pets up to 15 lbs, while the Large carrier spans 20 x 13 x 13 inches, accommodating pets as heavy as 25 lbs. Please select the appropriate carrier by considering your pet's length, height, and weight following our detailed size chart.

Flight Compatibility: Medium size is compliant with the under-seat requirements of most airlines. We advise verifying with your chosen airline before travel, as regulations vary. The Large size is versatile for everyday use, whether in a car, alongside luggage, or hand-carried.

Reinforced Material: We’ve upgraded with bite-resistant & scratch-resistant Textilene mesh and thickened tear-proof nylon cloth, to ensure a visible, breathable and safe space for your pets. The high-quality PU leather handle and adjustable shoulder strap with a metal snap hook provide comfort and safety during transport.

Thoughtful Features: PET MARVEL cat carriers have 4 mesh windows for ventilation and 3 wide doors that can be opened for easy access. An additional generous side storage pocket collects more stuff like water bottles, snacks and wipes. Equipped with a secure buckle to prevent your pet from escaping.

Soft & Washable Mat: Unlike the typical cardboard bases, we utilize a waterproof, hard plastic board for stability. Topped with a sponge and velvet, it provides a plush resting area. Our carrier, including the mat (once the board is removed), is fully washable. Obviously, it is collapsible if you want after drying.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier well-made and sturdy. However, the size receives mixed feedback - while some say it's good for medium/small cats, others find it too big. The durability is also mixed, with some customers describing it as sturdy while others say it's not quite sturdy enough.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be well-made and of good quality.

examples.snippet: Great quality and just the right size
This carrier is great! I love it and my cat does too… she just hangs out in it. It is for smaller cats. My cat is 14 lbs and it was too small....
Well made. Have used twice. Perfect for 10 pound cat.
Very well made, but did not work for my 17lb. Puppy. Didn’t seem quite sturdy enough for his weight.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's size, with some finding it good for medium and small cats while others say it's too big and the measurements are misleading.

examples.snippet: I love the larger carrier however I needed the TSA approved carrier for a flight....
...If you have both ends open it doesn't stay up. Also the measurements are misleading which was very disappointing....
We use this for our 4 m/o kitten to go places. She fits perfect in it and I can comfortably put a small towel and toys in there with her....

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's durability, with some finding it sturdy while others report it's not quite sturdy enough and lacks stability.

examples.snippet: ...It's tough and pretty sturdy. Love the metal zippers and the fact it's collapsible.
...He did this by pressing his head up on the carrier lid. The mesh separated from the seam. It appears to me that this one is defective....
...This one was very flimsy and my dog was able to rip the lining and get out of the carrier so it was completely useless

authors_reviews.title: Nice pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: I havent actually used this to take my cats anywhere and I don't know when I will, but my old one fell apart and I needed one on hand. The quality of this carrier seems very good. It has good ventilation, a zipper pocket, and front and top access. It comes with a shoulder attachment and inside there is a little tether if your pet is wearing a collar and you wanted to open the door, they couldn't go far. If I use this and have any issues, I will update my review, but so far I'm really happy with it, & I may even get a 2nd one.Pic is of my biggest cat, he is a chonky boy at almost 20 lbs.
authors_reviews.author: Tabitha

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality
authors_reviews.text: Great quality and just the right size
authors_reviews.author: PZibbo

authors_reviews.title: Too big for the plane
authors_reviews.text: Doesn’t fit under the seat on the airplane. I got this pet carrier to transport my Boston terrier on a plane. The carrier is too big to fit under the seat in front of me .
authors_reviews.author: Isabelle

authors_reviews.title: Excellent pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: This is an excellent, very high-quality product. It features three zippers that make it easy to place your kitten inside. The internal structure is rigid, yet the fabric lining is very soft; furthermore, this lining has its own zipper, allowing you to remove and wash it. In addition to its two carrying handles, it includes a long strap that allows you to carry it slung over your shoulder. My cat fit inside with complete comfort, despite being a bit chubby.
authors_reviews.author: Nubia

authors_reviews.title: Best large carrier
authors_reviews.text: Absolutely outstanding! Held my 23lb cat and didn’t break! Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Ann Reece

authors_reviews.title: Excelente
authors_reviews.text: Excelente calidad para el costo, las manijas son super fuertes y de buena calidad al igual que las cremalleras y materiales se ven muy bueno y resistentes, super recomendable
authors_reviews.author: Jorge corradine

authors_reviews.title: Measurements are misleading, not as much room as expected. Stability so-so
authors_reviews.text: 3.5 stars. This carrier is fashioned more like a purse-carrier combo which is nice in that aspect. The construction is sturdy but the stability is not. When one end flap is open the top tends to 'cave' down onto the pet a bit. If you have both ends open it doesn't stay up. Also the measurements are misleading which was very disappointing. The length is actually 17 inches, the 17.5 is only because the end pocket sticks out a bit but it's not extra inside room for the pet. Also the design itself is more 'concave' so the top is also shorter than the 17 inches since it's not square. Overall, not as much room for the pet as you might be expecting. For pets under 5 lbs, it might be enough and could double like a purse. It has soft pleather handles which is a nice feature--all pet carriers should have this. It also has good air flow with only one end not having the mesh panel. Definitely NOT for pets up to 15lbs, maybe 8 lbs max (ours is 5 lbs and it was a bit tight), or a cat that curls up but think of their comfort if they need to stretch out before choosing this one, especially if for a plane ride. Kudos for the company shipping in an actual box instead of flimsy plastic like their competitors.
authors_reviews.author: Straight up reviews

authors_reviews.title: Love it
authors_reviews.text: Perfect carrier for a medium to large cat. My cat is 8 pounds and it was perfect for her. I like that my cat can see me and I can comfort her rather than being in a plastic box. It's tough and pretty sturdy. Love the metal zippers and the fact it's collapsible.
authors_reviews.author: Aaron Hepler
